name: Ivanhoe Mines Ltd.
description: Ivanhoe Mines is a Canadian mining company focused on three principal operations in Southern Africa: the Kamoa-Kakula Copper Complex in the DRC (one of the world's largest copper mines), the Kipushi zinc-copper-germanium-silver mine in the DRC, and the Platreef platinum-palladium-nickel-copper mine in South Africa. The company is a major copper producer and is ramping up a 500,000-tonne-per-annum direct-to-blister copper smelter in the DRC. Ivanhoe is a large-cap diversified base and precious metals producer with world-class tier-one assets.
